mapper.sql: code, id, var, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo
mapper.insert: insert into t_sys_variable (code, id, var, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo) values (#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_sys_variable
code,
id,
var,
remark,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_sys_variable
id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
var = #{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_sys_variable set id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, var = #{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select code, var from t_sys_variable where effectiveFrom < now() and effectiveTo is null

select * from t_sys_variable
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
order by priority

select count(*) from t_sys_variable
#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{var,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from t_sys_variable
#{model.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{model.var,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( code like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or var like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_sys_variable
#{model.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{model.var,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( code like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or var like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
